reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All gates passed. The code reading is factually correct: new_for_block_publishing (data_column_verification.rs:221-250) bypasses signature verification (verify_proposer_and_signature), parent block verification (verify_parent_block_and_finalized_descendant), inclusion proof verification (verify_column_inclusion_proof), and KZG verification (verify_kzg_for_data_column), using from_execution_verified instead which wraps columns without cryptographic checks. This violates the 01e spec requirement (outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json, property PROP-6a4369e9-post-003): 'After distributed blob publishing, imported columns must behave as if received via gossip.' Trust boundary consideration: The attack requires a compromised or buggy local EL (engine_getBlobs), which is a SEMI_TRUSTED component per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json. However, Engine API vulnerabilities are explicitly in-scope with the note that 'attacks requiring a compromised local EL may be considered conditional or lower severity.' The spec requires defense-in-depth: CL should verify data before propagating to untrusted P2P peers, regardless of EL trust level. Severity adjustment: Original HIGH downgraded to MEDIUM due to conditional nature (requires compromised/buggy EL) and limited blast radius (affects nodes with buggy EL implementations and their immediate peers). Impact includes failed block propagation and peer scoring penalties, but does not directly cause slashing or affect >33% of network. Classified as CONFIRMED_POTENTIAL rather than CONFIRMED_VULNERABILITY due to the requirement for EL compromise/bug and uncertainty about whether this design choice was intentional (comment at L219 states 'EL will have already verified the cell proofs', suggesting this may be by design, though it violates the spec requirement for gossip-equivalent treatment).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: After distributed blob publishing, imported columns must behave as if received via gossip. (forall col from EL: imported(col) => treated_as_gossip(col) == true)
